title: Sampling and Priority Sampling Flow
interaction_flow: DDTrace\Tracer → ext: set_priority_sampling($priority, false) [updates root span of active stack]
DDTrace\Tracer → ext: set_priority_sampling($priority, true)  [also sets global default]
ext → C Extension: stores samplingPriority on RootSpanData or global default
if propagatedPriority != null → ext: set_priority_sampling($propagatedPriority) [root span only]
DDTrace\Tracer → ext: get_priority_sampling(false) [reads from root span of active stack]
ext → C Extension: check drop eligibility
C Extension: REJECT drop IF span has non-dropped child spans
C Extension: REJECT drop IF generate_distributed_tracing_headers() was called on this span
C Extension: REJECT drop IF a span link to this span was generated
C Extension: ACCEPT drop OTHERWISE → no metrics collected for span
ext → Integration: return bool (true = dropped, false = not dropped)
ext → C Extension: check if memory usage > configured limits
ext → DDTrace\Tracer: return bool (true = memory overused / limited)
ext → C Extension: check memory usage against DD_TRACE_MEMORY_LIMIT
ext → Caller: return bool (true = under limit, false = over limit)
ext → C Extension: sets DDTRACE_SPAN_FLAG_OPENTRACING bit on SpanData
ext → C Extension: sets DDTRACE_SPAN_FLAG_OPENTRACING bit on SpanData
key_data_structures: RootSpanData extends SpanData: has samplingPriority (int, default DD_TRACE_PRIORITY_SAMPLING_UNKNOWN) and propagatedSamplingPriority (int, from distributed tracing headers)
key_relationships: DDTrace\Tracer wraps ext functions set_priority_sampling / get_priority_sampling / dd_trace_tracer_is_limited
DDTrace\OpenTracer\Tracer uses DDTrace\Internal\add_span_flag to mark OT-created spans
CurlIntegration calls try_drop_span on span close if no curl handles processed
SymfonyIntegration registers onClose handler that calls try_drop_span for unneeded spans
set_priority_sampling with $global=false updates active trace root span
set_priority_sampling with $global=true also sets the process-wide default priority
important_notes: Priority sampling controls Datadog agent/backend keep-vs-drop decisions; AUTO_ values are set by the agent, USER_ values by user code
try_drop_span silently drops a span without breaking trace integrity; fails if span has children, distributed headers, or span links
dd_trace_tracer_is_limited returns true = memory OVERUSED; dd_trace_check_memory_under_limit returns true = memory OK (inverse semantics)
DD_TRACE_MEMORY_LIMIT env var controls the byte threshold for memory limit checks
add_span_flag is @internal, used by OpenTracing/OpenTelemetry bridges to tag spans with their originating API
Namespaces: sampling/stack functions are in DDTrace\, internal flags in DDTrace\Internal\, diagnostics in global namespace
